wins.event: Q3 net sales $2.13B, +11.7% YoY — strongest quarterly daily sales rate since Q1 2023
Operating margin 20.7%, +40 bps YoY; gross margin 45.3%, +40 bps YoY
Sites spending $50K+/month grew 15.4%; national accounts revenue up double digits
FMI sales reached 45.3% of total (up from 43%); FMI daily sales grew nearly 18% YoY
Net income +12.6%, EPS +12.3%; operating cash flow $386.9M (115% of net income)

risks.event: Q3 pricing impact came in at 240-270 bps, below earlier 300+ bps target; explicit reduction announced
Q4 pricing goal explicitly lowered from 5-8% to 3.5-5.5% on like-for-like parts
Margin squeeze risk flagged for Q4 as tariff costs continue to rise
Industrial economy remains in contraction with PMI averaging 48.6 in Q3
Trade policy/tariff litigation uncertainty limits visibility into Q4 demand

guidance.notes: CFO explicitly lowered Q4 pricing goal on like-for-like parts from 5-8% to 3.5-5.5%; gross margin guidance for full year 'relatively flat with 2024' (no improvement) with margin squeeze flagged as plausible in Q4.

_notes: Strong execution narrative with explicit guidance reduction on pricing — clear mixed signal that the existing pipelines may have under-weighted. Both pipelines predicted long; realised excess_5d ~0%, essentially flat.
